description: Browser, desktop, clipboard, file, and UI-operation tasks.

mini_tasks.goal: Open the local Octopus demo page and verify the title is visible.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Observed URL, visible title, and verification status.

mini_tasks.goal: Inspect the local Octopus app page and verify that Goal, Need, Feed, and Output regions are visible.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Observed app URL, visible region checklist, and verification status.

mini_tasks.goal: Observe the local docs/demo surface, identify the primary call-to-action, and verify the page has a visible Octopus product signal.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Observed URL, primary call-to-action, visible Octopus signal, and verification status without destructive actions.
